issues.title: Add weight column to item table
issues.description: Add a `weight` numeric column to the item table. Acceptance: every item row has a non-null weight. See plans/post_123.md.

issues.title: Backfill weights for existing items
issues.description: Backfill weight values for all existing items. Acceptance: no item has a null/zero weight in prod. See plans/post_123.md.
depends_on: Add weight column to item table

issues.title: Derive carryCapacity from strength stat
issues.description: Compute carryCapacity from the character's strength stat. Acceptance: capacity updates live when strength changes. See plans/post_123.md.
depends_on: Add weight column to item table

issues.title: Replace slot grid with weight-based list view
issues.description: Rework inventory UI from a slot grid to a weight-based list with a capacity bar. Acceptance: matches plan's UI workstream. See plans/post_123.md.
